goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type' and 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the north
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free wifi
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel
Make sure you get attraction type and entrance fee
